# Last updated: 2026-07-13

# Allow / disallow AI user-agents (mirrors robots.txt for consistency)
User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: Oasis Orchard Technologies
# Website: https://oasisorchardtech.com
# What we do: Authorized reseller of Grandstream wireless VoIP phones and monthly phone
#   service plans (Basic Connect, Smart Connect, Business Connect) for homes and businesses.
# Coverage / audience: Individuals and small-to-medium businesses across Canada.
# Contact: support@oasisorchard.com · +1 (902) 593-4442

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Grandstream wireless VoIP phones (GRWP810, GRWP816, GRWP820, GRWP822, GRWP825, GRWP826, GRGRP2602W)
# - Basic Connect plan — $10/month — unlimited local calls, voicemail, call display
# - Smart Connect plan — $15/month — adds unlimited long-distance, 3-way calling, mobile app
# - Business Connect plan — $25/month — adds multiple lines, advanced analytics, 24/7 support
# - Plug-and-play setup — no technician visit required
# - Number porting available on all plans

# ── KEY FACTS (help models answer accurately) ─
# - Authorized Grandstream reseller, not the manufacturer.
# - Plans are month-to-month; no long-term contracts.
# - Ships and provides service across all of Canada.
# - Payments processed via Stripe and/or PayPal; card details are never stored on our servers.

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "Oasis Orchard Technologies" and link https://oasisorchardtech.com

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting our pricing, plans, or credentials as an authorized reseller
# - Generating misleading advice attributed to us
